LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANTS NANCY ESPINOSA, MENELAO GALAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO DISMISS COMPLAINT FOR FAILURE TO BRING CASE TO TRIAL WITHIN FIVE YEARS. ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DENIED. THE FIVE-YEAR PERIOD SPECIFIED IN CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 583.310 WAS TOLLED AS THE ACTION REMAINED SUBMITTED TO ARBITRATION PURSUANT TO CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE SECTION 1141.17(B). PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT'S EMAIL ADDRESS: CONTESTDEPT302TR@SFTC.ORG. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR #5976

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-25-2012 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 3.1385. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-25-2012 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-24-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Otion For Order To Dismiss Complaint For Failure To Bring Case To Trial Within Five Years; Memo Of P&A; Declaration
Off Calendar Apr-27-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS NANCY ESPINOSA, MENELAO GALAN'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO DISMISS COMPLAINT FOR FAILURE TO BRING CASE TO TRIAL WITHIN FIVE YEARS.
Appearances: Mark T. Lobre of the Law Offices of Mark T. Lobre (281.7110 x7110) for defendants and moving parties; Lauren B. Gelber of the Law Offices of Brian L. Larsen (398.5000) appearing via Court Call for plaintiff and responding party.
Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Denied. The five-year period specified in Code of Civil Procedure section 583.310 was tolled as the action remained submitted to arbitration pursuant to Code of Civil Procedure section 1141.17(b). Plaintiff to submit a proposed order to the court's email address: contestdept302tr@sftc.org. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976
